series_metadata.series_description: The records contain license applications (new and renewal), Auction School information (e.g. transcripts of the course of study in professional auctioneering and class Completion Certificates), police background investigations, and miscellaneous correspondence (e.g. address changes, changes of sponsor, and bond cancelations), and the auctioneer test answer sheet. The auctioneer test is administered at the Dept. of Agriculture.Note: The license applications contain names, addresses, and Soc. Sec. numbers.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: Review auctioneer files every and dispose of any that are not in active status
